calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff B.D. Thakor.
Defendants, Rigoberto Calderon, Jr., and Robert Amorelli, present in pro per. Rigoberto Calderon (not Jr.) is to be dismissed per defendants' counsel.
Parties met in Dept 620 and reached a settlement.
Terms of the oral settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant in the amount of $4,178.00 and for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 56 Mason Street #203, San Francisco. Stayed of execution to May-05-2004 at 9:00am. If Defendants vacate the premises, the Judgment will be deemed satisfied and no monies will be owing. Alternatively, if Defendants pay $2,250.00 by MAY-04-2004 AT 12 Noon, the eviction is stayed as long as the Defendants pay $425.00 on the 1st and 15th of each month plus $75.00 towards the outstanding balance until paid in full. Each party waives claim against the other. Defendants warrant that no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Each party shall bear their own attorney fees and costs.
If the Defendant fails to comply with the terms, Plaintiff shall, without notice to defendants, reschedule the eviction for immediate restitution and possession of the premises.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
